message:
chore(beads): untrack .beads/.br_history/ snapshots from git

These beads_rust issue tracker history snapshots were already covered
by the .gitignore pattern `**/.beads/.br_history/issues.*.jsonl` but
remained tracked because they were committed before the ignore rule
was added. Untracking them (via `git rm --cached`) means git will
never report deletions, additions, or modifications to these files
again, regardless of what `br` does on disk.

Files remain on disk — only the git index entries are removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
